We rolled out this product suite, starting with our Google Business Profile Automation Tool, because we heard, you know, more and more about, property management companies wanting to make sure that they looked great on their Google Business profiles, but then in doing that, 87% renters are starting their new search for an apartment home on Google.

So, when they come across your Google business profiles, again, not only are we making sure that the digital curb appeal is there, and they're able to gather as much information from your profiles, but then Google is going to reward relevant, frequent, and unique content to your Google business profiles.

So, with that being said, here is our Google Business Profile Automation tool.
We are going to integrate with Yardi to do 4 things on the profiles daily.

There is simply not enough time in the day to keep up with all of this and keep track of it all.

So what we've done to get ahead of that is we actually place these questions on your profile, and then we edit the answer daily.
So, we place up to 20 questions on the profile based on the amenities that you offer, like, of course, like, an EV charger, pool, in-unit laundry… parking, covered parking.
So we place all these questions on your profile, and then we edit the answer daily.
